header.name: Sijoy Almeida
header.tagline: Musician · Creator · The Vasaikar Who Went Viral
header.location: Boston, MA · Originally from Vasai, Maharashtra

story.headline: From an empty church in Vasai to 25 million views.
paragraphs: I taught myself piano, harmonica, guitar, and vocals in an empty church. No lessons. No academy. Just hours of practice and a hacked power supply I soldered myself at age 12 because I couldn't afford batteries.

In 2020, I joined a band as a singer — not a pianist. "Vasaikar Masala" crossed 25 million views and became a cultural moment for the Konkani community. When the band split, I started my own channel and never looked back.
I produce, sing, and engineer everything myself. Music and technology aren't different worlds — they're both about building systems that work beautifully.

discography.title: Vasaikar Masala
discography.note: The one that started it all

origin.title: JoSho = John + Shobha
origin.text: Named after my parents. Everything I build — music or technology — is built on the foundation they gave me.
